reason: Acceptance criteria checklist: all 15 items must pass including AgentCard fetch, Chief delegation, PetWindow display, timeout, abort, error handling
Verify error handling for network failures, DNS errors, timeout, invalid AgentCard format
Code quality checks: no hardcoded values, proper type safety, consistent patterns
Settings UI component quality: form validation, loading states, error display for remote agent forms
Type safety: PetProfile a2a field properly typed, discriminated union for remote vs local agent handling
